task: Prevent Day 0 safety confirmation timeout from blocking Day 1 practice entry

governance_bootstrap.summary: UI and code changes require real verification, completion evidence, and exact residual risk reporting.
Completion for customer-facing changes requires real runtime or user-facing verification and completion guard validation.

changes: Changed Day 0 safety confirmation to open Day 1 immediately with an optimistic local state update.
Kept the server sync request in the background so persistence can still complete without blocking the learner's screen transition.
Changed timeout handling so a 408 after Day 1 opens does not show the red failure state or reset the safety gate.
Added frontend state types for backend fields used by the optimistic transition.

verification.name: edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-DwmWW17K.js

verification.name: optimistic transition bundle check
verification.command: rg -o 'Day 1 화면은 열렸어요|Day 0 완료! Day 1 실습으로 이동했어요|last_client_seq|show_continue_from' harness-os/edu-app/src harness-os/edu-app/dist/assets/index-DwmWW17K.js
verification.result: passed: source and production bundle contain the optimistic Day 1 transition and timeout notice paths

verification.name: Mac Mini runtime entrypoint check
verification.target: macmini edu app and backend URLs
verification.command: curl -fsS --max-time 5 http://100.97.175.44:5174/ | head -5 && curl -fsS --max-time 5 http://100.97.175.44:8000/ | head -5
verification.result: passed: both runtime HTTP entrypoints returned HTML

residual_risk: No authenticated browser click replay was available in this session; verification used build, lint, regression tests, bundle checks, and live Mac Mini HTTP entrypoints.
